patient_context: Ravi (RAVI-DEMO-003) attended Ophthalmology clinic on 14 March 2026 for review of inherited retinal dystrophy. The uploaded genomic report is being used to support clinician interpretation of a possible RPE65-related finding within the current referral.
clinical_findings: The report context describes progressive visual impairment with night blindness and peripheral field difficulty. ERG shows severely attenuated scotopic responses (b-wave ~18 µV; reference >150 µV), and OCT demonstrates outer nuclear layer thinning (~42 µm), supporting rod-predominant retinal dysfunction.
summary: Genomic testing identified an RPE65 NM_000329.3:c.260A>G (p.Asp87Gly) variant for clinician review in a patient with inherited retinal dystrophy.
